name: Five Layer Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped dried Raisins, Apricots or Miniature Marshmallows
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place butter in a 13x9x2-inch baking pan and heat until melted. Remove the pan from the oven.
3. Stir together crumbs, cocoa, and sugar; sprinkle evenly over the melted butter.
4. Pour sweetened condensed milk evenly over the crumb mixture.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips and raisins (or dried apricots or miniature marshmallows) on top.
6. Sprinkle nuts on top and press down firmly.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until lightly browned. Allow to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
8. Cover with foil and let stand at room temperature for 6 to 8 hours before cutting into bars. Approximately 36 bars result.
